word: G1215 - δημηγορέω - dēmēgoréō - day-may-gor-eh'-o - Make an oration

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Make an oration
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to address a public assembly, make a speech to the people
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of G1218 and G58; to be a people gatherer, that is, to address a public assembly: - make an oration.
